channel.title: Copley Family Research Vault
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Copley Family Research Vault

item.title: Search Index
item.description: Comprehensive searchable index of all people, places, topics, and dates in the Copley Family Research Vault.

item.title: CLAUDE
item.description: CLAUDE.md — Copley Family Research Vault This file gives AI agents instant orientation for working on this project.

item.title: Phase 2A Handoff Summary
item.description: Phase 2A Handoff Summary (for next agent) 1) User Request Perform site improvements following Phase 1E review: Fix Mermaid family tree diagram (floating/disconnected nodes) Add a search-optimized index page Update agent handoff as work progresses Working from local clone at: /mnt/c/Users/zach/Projec...

item.title: Phase 2B Handoff Summary
item.description: Phase 2B Handoff Summary (for next agent) 1) Source Documents Read This Session Two new PDFs gleaned: ~/Downloads/COPLEY HISTORY PART 1 final 2.pdf — main history (read in prior session; image extraction done this session) ~/Downloads/Part 1 Appendices .pdf — full biographical sketches for G24–G27 f...
